name: THE ORIGINAL KIMBALL POPCORN BALL LLC

violations.description: Demonstration of knowledge by person in charge. — --Person in charge did not demonstrate adequate knowledge of the food service code requirements. Acting manager had no knowledge of sanitization process for cleaning.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. no sanitization process for cleaning equipment.
Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --An approved sanitizer was not used during three compartment sink operation.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. Ceiling above cooking equipment were not smooth and cleanable.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Ceilings around air vents were dirty, floors had build up of debris.
Clean, maintained, tissue, vented, self-closing door (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
